name: google-searchconsole-mcp
description: Connect Google Search Console to Claude — query search analytics, inspect URLs, find keyword opportunities, and track SEO performance.

tools.name: list_accounts
tools.description: List all authenticated Google accounts and their associated GSC sites

tools.name: list_sites
tools.description: List all sites you have access to in Google Search Console

tools.name: query_search_analytics
tools.description: Query search analytics data — clicks, impressions, CTR, and position by dimension

tools.name: inspect_url
tools.description: Check URL indexing status, mobile usability, and rich results

tools.name: list_sitemaps
tools.description: List all submitted sitemaps and their status

tools.name: find_keyword_opportunities
tools.description: Find high-impression, low-CTR keywords — quick SEO wins

tools.name: get_top_pages
tools.description: Get top pages sorted by clicks, impressions, CTR, or position

tools.name: compare_performance
tools.description: Compare search performance between two time periods

tools.name: analyze_brand_queries
tools.description: Analyze brand vs non-brand organic traffic split

tools.name: get_keyword_trend
tools.description: Get daily trend data for a specific keyword

tools.name: export_analytics
tools.description: Export search analytics as CSV or JSON

tools.name: query_by_search_appearance
tools.description: Filter by search appearance type (AMP, FAQ, Rich Results, etc.)

tools.name: query_by_search_type
tools.description: Filter by search type: web, image, video, news, or discover
